text: Bitcoin has shed 2.7% in the past day while Ethereum has fallen more steeply at 5.3%, signaling that altcoins are absorbing disproportionate selling pressure as risk appetite contracts. The Fear & Greed Index at 23 reflects extreme fear with no improvement over the past week, suggesting sentiment remains deeply pessimistic despite the moderate price declines. Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 56.2% paired with $79B in daily volume indicates that while traders are nervous, they haven't fully retreated—capital is rotating defensively rather than exiting entirely.
